selectionRules.when: requestedMode equals open-or-activate and instanceId is absent
requestedMode equals new-instance and instanceId is valid and unique
one operator request produced more than one new top-level window or repeated one workspace identity
new-instance lacks a valid instanceId or would reuse the canonical tmux session

steps: emit selected workflow and proof ceiling
forbidden: same tmux session for an explicit separate instance
runtime success claim from configuration intent
